title: Share a board URL from the native app

posts.author: annie-c (Annie)
posts.cookedHtml: Every time I try to share a board with a teammate from the Mac app, I try this link and am disappointed to see that it still doesn’t work as I would expect (opening the board in the browser). Can we have a hyperlink to the board somewhere, like behind the board info icon or the Invite modal?
